description: Enhance the existing blog posting system with additional features and improvements

tasks.task: Review and verify the existing blog API implementation in src/blog/. The current implementation has BlogController at /posts with full CRUD (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE) and BlogService with in-memory storage. Consider adding: (1) validation using class-validator DTOs, (2) pagination support for findAll(), (3) sorting options (by date, title), (4) a 'published' status field to support draft posts. Update the Post interface in blog.service.ts and add corresponding endpoints.

Review and enhance the existing blog UI components in src/components/. Current components include PostList.tsx, PostDetail.tsx, CreatePost.tsx, and EditPost.tsx. Consider adding: (1) Loading states and error handling improvements, (2) Pagination UI in PostList if backend supports it, (3) Search/filter functionality, (4) Draft vs Published toggle in CreatePost if backend adds status field, (5) Better styling with CSS classes already defined (post-list, post-detail, create-post-form). API calls use http://localhost:3000/posts.

example_backend: GET /posts returns list of posts with 200 status
GET /posts/:id returns single post with 200, or 404 if not found
POST /posts creates new post and returns 201 with created post
PATCH /posts/:id updates post and returns updated post
Test validation errors return proper 400 responses
example_frontend: Post list displays all posts from API
Clicking a post title navigates to detail view
New Post button opens create form
Create form submits and adds post to list
Edit button opens edit form with pre-filled data
Delete button shows confirmation and removes post
Error states display appropriately when API fails
